scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @meeting-copilot/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @meeting-copilot/desktop lint && corepack pnpm --filter @meeting-copilot/ai-service lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @meeting-copilot/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @meeting-copilot/desktop test && corepack pnpm --filter @meeting-copilot/ai-service test
